title: codereview: missing polling and key mapping in driver
description: Implementation lacks k_thread for periodic I2C reads from keyboard registers (0x03 for status on TCA8418), keycode to INPUT_KEY_* mapping (arrows, enter, numbers from T-Deck layout), and input_sync calls. Renode stub will need update for functional test. P0. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zonh.3
close_reason: Driver polling k_thread, TCA8418 reg 0x03 reads, full INPUT_KEY mapping for T-Deck layout, input_sync, Renode functional stub. 3 codereview passes clean. Tests pass.
